## New App Submission

### App Details
- **Name:**
- **URL:**
- **Category:**

### Checklist

- [ ] I've added a valid JSON entry to `/data/apps.json`
- [ ] The entry includes all required fields: `id`, `name`, `description`, `url`, `category`, `tags`
- [ ] The `id` is unique, lowercase, and hyphenated (e.g. `my-app`)
- [ ] The URL is working and publicly accessible
- [ ] This app is not already listed in the directory
- [ ] The description is 1–2 sentences, clear and concise
- [ ] I've verified the JSON is valid (no syntax errors)
